overview.description: The State Street SPDR Nuveen ICE High Yield Municipal Bond ETF (HYMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of high-yield and investment grade fixed-rate municipal US bonds with at least a year to maturity. HYMB was launched on Apr 13, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: ICE US Select High Yield Crossover Municipal Index
